# CMSSignerStatus.needsDetachedContent

**Case**

The message was signed but has detached content. You must call the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/CMSDecoderSetDetachedContent(_:_:)] function before ascertaining the signature status.

## Declaration

```swift
case needsDetachedContent
```
title: CMSSignerStatus.needsDetachedContent
